name: ASRock B860M LIGHTNING WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8666+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Killer 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A
shortName: ASRock B860M LIGHTNING WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: ASRock B860M LIGHTNING WIFI Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Thunderbolt 4, and Wi-Fi 6E for Intel LGA 1851.
